prompt: Rotating Wheel Spokes. Light background. One circle (black #212121, 160px diameter) placed at the center acts as a wheel rim. Inside the circle four thin lines (160px length, 6px thickness, gray #616161) pass through the center forming cross spokes: one horizontal, one vertical, and two diagonal lines at 45°. All lines are fixed to the center of the circle like wheel spokes. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Circle and all four lines fade in together at center. 1-6s: The entire wheel system (circle and all attached lines) rotates continuously around its center completing two full rotations (0° -> 720°). The spokes remain fixed relative to the circle and rotate together with it. 6-8s: Rotation gradually slows until the wheel stops at its original orientation. Total duration: 8s.

Basic Pie Chart Reveal. White background. Circle (300px diameter, centered). Acts as a pie chart with two slices: Blue (#2196F3) for 70%, Green (#4CAF50) for 30%. Animation (6s): 0-2s: Blue slice draws in radially from top center (0°) to 252° (using conic-gradient sweep). 2-4s: Green slice draws in from 252° to 360°, completing the circle. 4-6s: Hold complete. Total duration: 6s.

Donut Chart with Metric Counter. Light grey background (#F5F5F5). Donut chart (280px diameter, 40px thickness, centered). Base ring is light grey (#E0E0E0). Progress ring is purple (#9C27B0). In the center: Text '0%'. Animation (7s): 0-1s: Base ring fades in. 1-4s: Progress ring draws radially from 0° to 270° (75% full). Simultaneously, center text counts up from '0%' to '75%'. 4-5s: Text pulses slightly (scale 100% -> 110% -> 100%). 5-7s: Hold. Total duration: 7s.

Exploding Pie Chart Highlight. Dark background (#212121). Pie chart (250px diameter, centered) with three equal slices (120° each): Red (#E53935), Yellow (#FDD835), Blue (#1E88E5). Animation (8s): 0-3s: All three slices draw in radially simultaneously from 0° to 360°. 3-4s: Hold complete circle. 4-5.5s: Yellow slice 'explodes' by shifting 30px outward from the center along its bisecting angle, while others stay put. 5.5-8s: Label 'Top Seller' fades in next to Yellow slice. Hold. Total duration: 8s.

Activity Rings (Concentric). Black background. Three concentric donut rings (thickness 20px each). Outer ring (300px diameter, red #FF5252), Middle ring (240px, green #69F0AE), Inner ring (180px, blue #448AFF). Animation (7s): 0-1s: All background tracks fade in (dimmed versions of colors). 1-3s: Outer ring draws to 80% (288°). 1.5-3.5s: Middle ring draws to 60% (216°). 2-4s: Inner ring draws to 40% (144°). (Overlapping sequential stagger). 4-7s: All rings hold. Total duration: 7s.

Segmented Gauge Meter. White background. Half-circle gauge (300px width, 150px height, flat bottom). Divided into three equal colored conic-gradient segments: Red (0-60°), Yellow (60-120°), Green (120-180°). Animation (6s): 0-2s: The colored segments sweep in from left (0°) to right (180°) revealing the gauge. 2-3s: Hold. 3-4s: A dark grey needle (base at bottom center) sweeps from 0° to 150° (landing in the green zone). 4-6s: Needle wobbles slightly (150° -> 148° -> 152° -> 150°) settling perfectly. Total duration: 6s.

Speedometer Progress to Target. Dark blue background (#1A237E). Circular gauge (260px). The track is an un-filled dashed line (grey). Animation (8s): 0-1s: Text 'Current Speed' fades in above. 1-4s: A solid cyan (#00E5FF) arc draws along the track from 0° to 220°. Simultaneously, a center number counts from 0 to '85'. 4-6s: Outer glow fades in around the cyan arc. 6-8s: Hold. Total duration: 8s.

Three-Step Funnel Chart. Light background. Three stacked trapezoids forming a funnel (centered). Top tier (Blue #2196F3, 300px wide top, 200px wide bottom, 80px tall). Middle tier (Orange #FF9800, 180px wide top, 100px wide bottom, 80px tall). Bottom tier (Green #4CAF50, 80px wide top, 40px wide bottom, 80px tall). 10px vertical gaps between tiers. Animation (9s): 0-1.5s: Top tier slides down from above and fades in. 1.5-3s: Middle tier slides down and fades in. 3-4.5s: Bottom tier slides down and fades in. 4.5-6s: White text labels ('10k', '5k', '1k') fade in on each tier sequentially. 6-9s: Hold. Total duration: 9s.

Connecting Line Graph (3 Data Points). Grid background (faint grey lines). Three connected line segments representing a graph (lines are 4px thick, blue #1976D2). Point A (bottom left) to Point B (middle high), Point B to Point C (middle low), Point C to Point D (right high). Animation (8s): 0-2s: Line 1 draws from A to B. 2-4s: Line 2 draws from B to C. 4-6s: Line 3 draws from C to D. 6-8s: Three solid blue circular dots (16px) pop in (scale 0->100% with bounce) at points B, C, and D simultaneously. Total duration: 8s.

Area Graph Reveal. White background. A jagged 'mountain' shape forming an area graph (Base spans 400px horizontally). The area is filled with a vertical gradient (Light green to transparent). Top edge has a solid 3px green line. Animation (7s): 0-4s: The entire area graph is revealed from left to right using a clipping mask that expands its width from 0px to 400px (Linear ease). 4-5s: A vertical dashed line drops down from the highest peak to the X-axis. 5-7s: Hold. Total duration: 7s.

Horizontal Stacked Bar Chart. Grey background (#EEEEEE). A single horizontal bar (height 60px, total width 500px, rounded ends). Composed of three stacked segments: Left (Red, 200px), Middle (Yellow, 150px), Right (Blue, 150px). Animation (8s): 0-2s: Red segment grows left-to-right from 0px to 200px. 2-4s: Yellow segment grows from 0px to 150px (pushing out from the red edge). 4-6s: Blue segment grows from 0px to 150px (pushing out from the yellow edge). 6-8s: White percentage text fades in centered inside each segment (40%, 30%, 30%). Total duration: 8s.

Radial Bar Chart (Polar Area). Dark background. Center origin. Three bars that grow outward radially (like thick pie slices extending outward to different lengths). Slice 1 (Magenta, extends 150px). Slice 2 (Cyan, extends 100px). Slice 3 (Yellow, extends 200px). Each slice is 60° wide. Animation (7s): 0-1s: Inner circle (origin point) scales in. 1-2.5s: Slice 1 grows outward from center. 2-3.5s: Slice 2 grows outward. 3-4.5s: Slice 3 grows outward. 4.5-7s: Entire formation rotates slowly 45° clockwise. Total duration: 7s.

Scatter Plot Generation. White background. L-shaped axes (X and Y, 2px black lines). Within the axes, 10 small circles (12px diameter, semi-transparent purple #9C27B0) scattered at different X/Y coordinates. Animation (9s): 0-2s: Y-axis draws bottom to top. X-axis draws left to right. 2-7s: The 10 dots pop in (scale 0->100%) sequentially one by one (0.5s stagger each). 7-9s: A trendline (dashed grey) draws diagonally through the cluster. Total duration: 9s.

Pyramid Hierarchy Chart. Light blue background. A triangle (300px base, 300px height) divided horizontally into 4 sections (using 4 stacked divs with triangle/trapezoid clipPaths). Colors from bottom to top: Dark blue, Medium blue, Light blue, White. Animation (8s): 0-4s: The pyramid builds from the ground up. Bottom tier fades and slides up, then second tier stacks on top, then third, then the white tip (1s per tier). 4-6s: A pulsing white glow appears behind the top tip. 6-8s: Hold. Total duration: 8s.

Comparison Split Bar (Tug-of-War). White background. One horizontal bar (500px wide, 40px tall, centered). Left half is Red, Right half is Blue. Text '40%' on red, '60%' on blue. Animation (6s): 0-1s: Bar appears as 50/50 split (250px each). 1-3s: The split line animates—Blue pushes Red, changing width to 300px Blue / 200px Red (simulating a tug-of-war data shift). 3-4s: Text labels fade in. 4-6s: Hold. Total duration: 6s.

Radar/Spider Chart Expansion. Dark background. Faint background graphic of concentric pentagon web lines. In the center, a colored, semi-transparent pentagon shape (Green #4CAF50, 50% opacity). Animation (7s): 0-2s: The web lines fade in. 2-5s: The green pentagon shape animates from a tiny center point expanding outward. Its 5 vertices expand at different speeds to unequal lengths, forming an irregular, skewed data polygon. 5-7s: Dots appear at the 5 outer vertices. Total duration: 7s.

Sales Bar Chart Dashboard. Background: light grey #F5F5F5. Title: 'Sales by Product Category' (30pt bold #2c3e50, top-center, 50px). Five vertical bars (70px width, 30px gaps), baseline 75% y. Product A: blue #2196F3, height 200px. Product B: green #4CAF50, height 240px. Product C: orange #FF9800, height 180px. Product D: purple #9C27B0, height 160px. Product E: red #E74C3C, height 190px. Above each bar: circular letter badge representing the product (40px diameter, white background, 50% border radius, containing letters A, B, C, D, and E in 20pt bold text matching their respective bar colors, centered). Below bars: product names (white 18pt on semi-transparent dark). Y-axis: 0K, 50K, 100K, 150K, 200K, 250K (16pt white labels). Horizontal gridlines (1px white 0.2 opacity). Values on bars: count numbers (16pt bold white, centered on bar). Canvas 1920x1080px. Animation (11s): 0-0.5s Title fades. 0.5-1s Y-axis labels and gridlines fade. 1-1.5s Circular badges appear above their bar positions with fade-in. 1.5-7s Bars grow 0 to target height sequentially L-R (each bar 0.8s, stagger 0.3s), ease-out. Rounded top corners 6px. 7-8.5s Value labels animate counting from 0 to target (1.5s). Color bar borders glow slightly (1px shadow). 8.5-10s Product names fade in below bars. 10-11s Hold with subtle shadow glow pulsing on bars. Total duration: 11s.

Glowing Dashed Circle Loader. Dark background (#121212). A centered circle with 220px diameter and 8px stroke thickness. The stroke uses a dashed pattern creating rotating segments around the circumference. Stroke color is cyan (#00E5FF) with a soft outer glow blur. Animation (7s): 0-1s: Circle fades in. 1-6s: The dashed stroke rotates continuously around the center while the glow intensity increases slightly. 6-7s: The glow softens and the loader holds. Total duration: 7s.

Gradient Sweep Rectangle. White background. A large rounded rectangle (420px width, 220px height, 24px corner radius) centered on screen. The rectangle uses a linear gradient fill transitioning from purple (#9C27B0) to blue (#1E88E5). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Rectangle fades in. 2-5s: The gradient angle rotates smoothly from 0° to 360° creating a sweeping color motion across the shape. 5-6s: Gradient motion slows and holds. Total duration: 6s.

Dashed Path Drawing With Glow. Dark background (#212121). A curved path line runs horizontally across the screen with 6px thickness using a dashed stroke pattern. The stroke color is bright orange (#FB8C00) with a subtle blur glow around it. Animation (8s): 0-2s: The dashed path draws from left to right using a stroke dash offset animation. 2-6s: The dashes animate continuously creating a flowing motion along the path while the glow pulsates slightly. 6-8s: Motion slows and the path holds. Total duration: 8s.

Rotating Gradient Ring With Motion Blur. Black background. A centered circular ring with 260px diameter and 20px thickness. The ring uses a multi-color gradient stroke transitioning from red (#E53935) to yellow (#FDD835) to blue (#1E88E5). Animation (7s): 0-1s: Ring fades in. 1-5s: The ring rotates continuously around its center while the gradient angle rotates creating a moving color spectrum. The ring also has a subtle motion blur trail. 5-7s: Rotation gradually slows and the ring holds. Total duration: 7s.

Dashed Square Orbit Indicator. Dark grey background (#2A2A2A). A square frame (240px size) with 6px dashed stroke lines centered on screen. Stroke color is neon green (#69F0AE). The dashed edges have a soft glow blur. Animation (6s): 0-1s: Square frame fades in. 1-4s: Dash segments move continuously along the square perimeter using stroke dash offset animation. 4-6s: Glow intensity increases slightly and then stabilizes while the dashed motion continues. Total duration: 6s.

Area Chart - Revenue Trend. Dark navy background (#0D1B3C). Title 'Monthly Revenue Trend' in bold white (32pt) positioned top-center with 40px margin. Chart area size 1200x500px positioned 100px from left and 150px from top. X-axis labels Jan through Dec in white (18pt). Y-axis labels $0, $10K, $20K, $30K, $40K, $50K in white (16pt). Horizontal gridlines 1px white at 0.15 opacity. Area fill uses blue (#2196F3) vertical gradient from solid at top to 0.1 opacity at bottom. Line stroke color #1565C0 with 4px thickness. Data points: 15K, 18K, 22K, 28K, 32K, 38K, 42K, 40K, 45K, 48K, 52K, 55K forming a smooth curve. Markers are 8px white circles with #1565C0 borders. Canvas size 1920x1080. Animation (10s): 0-0.5s title fades in. 0.5-1s axes and gridlines fade in. 1-7s area graph reveals from left to right over 6 seconds using a horizontal clipping mask while the line stroke appears simultaneously. 7-8s markers fade in at each data point with subtle scale animation (0.8 -> 1.0). 8-9s value labels appear above markers showing $XXK values counting up. 9-10s hold complete chart while marker glow pulses slightly.

Bar Glow Emphasis - Highlighting Top Performer. White background. Vertical bar chart with four bars labeled Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4. Bar colors: Q1 blue (#2196F3), Q2 green (#4CAF50), Q3 orange (#FB8C00), Q4 red (#F44336). Q4 represents the highest value ($70K). Animation timeline (8s): 0-4s regular bar chart growth animation where all bars rise from the baseline to their final heights and value labels appear above each bar. 4-4.8s emphasis effect begins: Q4 bar receives an animated glow where a red glow (#F44336) expands from 2px to 8px blur radius over 0.8 seconds. At the same time the Q4 bar border thickens from 1px to 3px white (#FFFFFF) and the value label '$70K' scales from 20pt to 28pt bold with its color brightening to gold (#FFD700). A semi-transparent highlight box (#FFF8DC, 0.4 opacity) appears behind the value label with 4px padding. Simultaneously Q1, Q2, and Q3 bars dim to 0.5 opacity and slightly desaturate to create comparative focus. 4.8-8s the Q4 glow continues pulsing in a 1 second cycle while other bars remain dimmed. Final state holds at 8 seconds with Q4 clearly emphasized as the top performer.

Area Graph Reveal. White background. A jagged 'mountain' shape forming an area graph (Base spans 400px horizontally). The area is filled with a vertical gradient (Light green to transparent). Top edge has a solid 3px green line. Animation (7s): 0-4s: The entire area graph is revealed from left to right using a clipping mask that expands its width from 0px to 400px (Linear ease). 4-5s: A vertical dashed line drops down from the highest peak to the X-axis. 5-7s: Hold. Total duration: 7s.

Grouped Bar Chart - Product Sales by Month. Background white (#FFFFFF). Title 'Product Sales by Month' in bold (#2C3E50) 32pt centered with 50px top margin. Six visible month groups Jan–Jun. Each month has three bars: Product A blue (#2196F3), Product B green (#4CAF50), Product C orange (#FF9800). Bar width 45px, gap between bars 8px, gap between month groups 30px. Heights grow from 0 to targets: Jan (A 150px, B 120px, C 100px), Feb (A 170px, B 140px, C 110px), Mar (A 140px, B 130px, C 120px), Apr (A 180px, B 150px, C 140px), May (A 160px, B 170px, C 130px), Jun (A 190px, B 180px, C 160px). Baseline positioned at 75% Y. X-axis month labels Jan–Jun (20pt white text on semi-transparent background). Y-axis labels 0, 50, 100, 150, 200 (16pt white). Horizontal gridlines 1px white with 0.2 opacity. Legend top-right showing Product A blue, Product B green, Product C orange (12pt white text). Canvas 1920x1080. Animation (12s): 0–0.5s title fades in. 0.5–1s legend fades in. 1–8s bar groups appear sequentially by month (Jan 1–1.8s, Feb 1.8–2.6s, Mar 2.6–3.4s, Apr 3.4–4.2s, May 4.2–5s, Jun 5–5.8s). Within each month the three bars grow simultaneously left-to-right with 0.05s stagger using ease-out scaling. 8–9s value labels above bars (12pt white) count from 0 to the target values. 9–10s X-axis labels fade in. 10–12s final hold.

Pie Chart Slice Pull-Out Emphasis. Background dark neutral (#1E1E1E). Base pie chart centered on canvas showing six segments: Electronics (32%, #FF6B6B), Software (#4CAF50), Services (#2196F3), Support (#FFC107), Training (#9C27B0), Other (#607D8B). Electronics is the largest slice. Canvas 1920x1080. Animation (12s): 0–5s normal pie chart animation completes with segments visible. At 5s the Electronics slice (32%, color #FF6B6B) pulls outward radially from the pie center by 50px while rotating +15° around its own center. A radial gradient overlay appears on this slice transitioning from bright #FF6B6B at the outer edge to darker #C62828 toward the center with soft radial falloff. Simultaneously the remaining slices (Software, Services, Support, Training, Other) dim to 0.4 opacity and slightly desaturate to reduce emphasis. A glow appears around the pulled Electronics slice using a 3px shadow (#FF6B6B) that pulses with a 0.8s cycle. 6–7s a small annotation arrow appears pointing toward the pulled slice with label 'Largest Market Segment' in bold white (12pt) placed inside a semi-transparent dark background box. The label fades in with a subtle horizontal wiggle (±2px). 7–12s hold state with the Electronics slice remaining pulled out and rotated while glow continues pulsing and the annotation stays visible.

Scatter Plot Generation. White background. L-shaped axes (X and Y, 2px black lines). Within the axes, 10 small circles (12px diameter, semi-transparent purple #9C27B0) scattered at different X/Y coordinates. Animation (9s): 0-2s: Y-axis draws bottom to top. X-axis draws left to right. 2-7s: The 10 dots pop in (scale 0->100%) sequentially one by one (0.5s stagger each). 7-9s: A trendline (dashed grey) draws diagonally through the cluster. Total duration: 9s.

Speedometer Progress to Target. Dark blue background (#1A237E). Circular gauge (260px). The track is an un-filled dashed line (grey). Animation (8s): 0-1s: Text 'Current Speed' fades in above. 1-4s: A solid cyan (#00E5FF) arc draws along the track from 0° to 220°. Simultaneously, a center number counts from 0 to '85'. 4-6s: Outer glow fades in around the cyan arc. 6-8s: Hold. Total duration: 8s.
